case_title: ESTATE LIQUIDATION OULET DON LOUDEN VS. FRANK ESCABAR

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,445.00 FILED BY ESTATE LIQUIDATION OUTLET DON LOUDEN AS TO DEFENDANT ESCABAR, FRANK ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-21-2021 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
COPYING FEES (5 PAGE) PAID BY PLAINTIFF ESTATE LIQUIDATION OUTLET DON LOUDEN
ORDER CASE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE PARTIES CAME TO A SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT PER PLAINTIFF REQUEST.

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITH PREJUDICE PER PLAINTIFF REQUEST. PLAINTIFF ESTATE LIQUIDATION OUTLET DON LOUDEN IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT FRANK ESCABAR IS NOT PRESENT. PLAINTIFF INFORMED THE COURT THAT PARTIES CAME TO A SETTLEMENT AND AGREEMENT AND THE CASE IS NOW SETTLED. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
